annual-budget-explanation.title: Getting higher budget than expected?
annual-budget-explanation.text: You may get some excess of monthly budget depending on several factors. The prediction takes into account Bitcoin CAGR, inflation, and other things that could lead to a greater than expected budget, considering the updates are made on a monthly basis and it's indexed by inflation rate.
app.title: Bitcoin Retirement Calculator
cannot-retire.text: Unfortunately you are not gonna make it at this time.
cannot-retire.text2: Stay humble, and keep stacking sats.
chart.title: Your retirement prediction
donate.qrcode.title: Support this project:
input.desired-monthly-income-tooltip: The amount of THB you want to spend monthly when you retire (in today's value, the system will adjust for inflation automatically).
input.inflation-rate-tooltip: The average annual increase in prices for goods and services (usually 1-3%).
mode-explanation.conservative-text: You don't want to take major risks. You plan to sell all of your Bitcoin at the moment you retire, and forget about price fluctuations in your retirement. While this approach is less risky, you're likely to get less FIAT for the Bitcoin you hodl.
mode-explanation.header: We give you two alternative strategies to calculate your retirement. Depending on how you plan your retirement, you may want to use one or the other.
mode-explanation.optimized-text: Your plan is to sell only the bitcoin you need every month based on the budget you expect to have, so you will keep taking advantage of your sats until the end of your life.
mode-explanation.title: What does this mean?
summary.monthly-retirement-budget: Monthly budget at start of retirement:
summary.monthly-retirement-budget-at-end: Monthly budget at end of life:
